pages.raw_text:
Mark the man.


Study his features, for this man
has a most remarkable sense of NOR
atty.


He is Frank l.. Boyd, mayor of
Spokane.


In an interview yesterday he said
he could not discern how the city
council could see any cause for the
revocation of the license of an en-
ployment agent who had tried to put
n young girl in house of shame If,
perchance, that young girl left the
employment agent anything like an
opening for the Infamous Offer


This man has been set foremost
Of ali men In Spokane by his fellow
men, yet according to his reasoning
he would hold nothing against that
man who as an employment agent
would hurl to the depths of degrade
tion his (the mayor's) own daughter
or sister, If perchance he had one.
who was at that turning point In her
life which comes to so many girls
when If set in the right path will
lead them into an honest. womanly
and true life, or If turned into the
downward road will lead them to ruin.


LOON at the picture. Study the
man.


Does he look like do-nothing
mayor?


The city charter provides:


THAT all licenses may be revoked
by the city council; first. for vlo-
lation OF any law of the state of
Washington; and, second, for the vio-
lation of any ordinance of the city.
"a Upon the recommendation of the
mayor, CD upon the recommendation
